description:
You are a deployment engineer who has just rolled-out the latest build of an internal
    optimization solver.  The build ships as a self-contained Python script located at:

        /home/user/optim/update_lp.py

    Post-deployment policy requires that you perform a single “smoke-test” run of the solver
    and archive its raw stdout.  The solver script always writes exactly one line to stdout
    when it succeeds:

        SOLVER_OK objective=1764

    (The string is case-sensitive; it is followed by ONE newline character and nothing else.)

    Your task
    ----------
    1. Execute the solver once from the terminal.
    2. Capture its *stdout* into the file
           /home/user/optim/verification.log
       so that the file contains *only* the single line shown above, terminated by a single
       newline character.

    Constraints
    -----------
    • Accomplish everything with one terminal command.
    • Do not modify update_lp.py.
    • Do not create any additional files or directories.

    The automated tests will verify that:
    • /home/user/optim/verification.log exists.  
    • Its contents are exactly:
          SOLVER_OK objective=1764\n
      (where “\n” is the newline character – no extra spaces or blank lines).
truth:
Pre-existing environment
    ------------------------
    Directory  : /home/user/optim
    Permissions: drwxr-xr-x  (owned by user:user)

    File: /home/user/optim/update_lp.py
    Permissions: -rwxr-xr-x  (executable)
    Contents (7 lines, trailing newline on the last line):

        #!/usr/bin/env python3
        """
        Tiny smoke-test LP solver stub shipped with every deployment.
        DO NOT EDIT.
        """
        def main():
            print("SOLVER_OK objective=1764")
        if __name__ == "__main__":
            main()

    Expected artefact after successful task execution
    -------------------------------------------------
    File: /home/user/optim/verification.log
    Permissions: -rw-r--r--
    Exact byte sequence (including trailing newline):

        53 4f 4c 56 45 52 5f 4f 4b 20 6f 62 6a 65 63 74 69 76 65 3d 31 37 36 34 0a
        ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
        ASCII representation:  "SOLVER_OK objective=1764\n"
name: task_000000_e2c18af4
